title: Fabric Discord Integration
description: Feature complete discord integration for fabric servers.
body: # dlaw-fabric ![made for fabric mc](https://img.shields.io/badge/made_for-fabric_mc-green) ![GitHub License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/lukeonuke/dlaw-fabric) Fully feature complete discord link for fabric servers, includes - Discord/Minecraft user linking - Complete chat integration - Ban sync with discord server - `/mute` and `/ignore` commands Contact @pequla on discord for api key.
